deeperExplanation: This concept goes deeper when you consider how it interacts with other parts of your python program.
mutabilityExplained: Consider whether your data structures should be mutable or immutable when implementing this pattern.
noneValue: Always check for null/None/undefined values — this is the most common source of runtime errors.
internalImplementation: The python runtime handles this efficiently behind the scenes.

examples.title: Your First Python Program
examples.code:
print("Hello, World!")

name = input("Enter your name: ")
print(f"Welcome, {name}!")
examples.explanation: This program demonstrates output, input, and string interpolation. The interpreter executes each line sequentially.

bestPractices: Write tests for both success and failure paths

debuggingWalkthrough.scenario: A common bug occurs when edge cases are not handled properly.

performanceNotes.notes: Performance depends on the specific implementation. Profile to identify bottlenecks.
